body.title: Fix stale palace path in context-load + add ethos node
body.result: Fixed stale palace path (agent_datacenter → unseen_university) + added ethos node query in context-load Step 2c; wrote palace.projects.unseen_university.ethos with compiled-inference principles
body.description:
context-load Step 2c was querying `palace.projects.agent_datacenter.summary` which no longer exists. Actual path is `palace.projects.unseen_university.summary`. Also added `palace.projects.unseen_university.ethos` — a new node containing the compiled-inference design principles from the ownership gap book, so future sessions load project ethos at startup without re-reading 7 chapters.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/context-load/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** skill file path fix + palace node creation only; no other workflow changes
**Completion criteria:** `context-load` Step 2c query includes both `unseen_university.summary` and `unseen_university.ethos`; `palace.projects.unseen_university.ethos` node exists in adc.palace with compiled inference principles
